name: GET /api/crm/_status - crm-service readiness probe
description: Operator-readable status route confirming crm-service has booted with DataService + PipelineDomain wired up. Lives until the GET /api/crm/pipeline aggregation endpoint (Phase 1 task #21) lands. Currently surfaces the running lead count to prove cross-table read connectivity (P4+ will switch to lead-service HTTP per Project-Structure.md §11).
skipReason: crm-service runs on port 4013 (per .env MONOREPO PORT MAP); the projexlight test runner targets a single base URL (4010 = user-service). Re-enable once the API gateway/BFF lands or the runner gains per-route base-URL support.

testCases.name: Service reports ready with lead count from shared DB
